name: Nord
description: Arctic, north-bluish color palette inspired by Nordic aesthetics.

preview.sampleText: An arctic, north-bluish color palette for clean, elegant interfaces.

classes.th: border border-gray-600 p-2 bg-gray-700 font-semibold text-blue-300
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-cyan-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-blue-200 bg-gray-800 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-gray-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-cyan-300
classes.pre: bg-gray-800 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto border border-gray-600
